name: cinlink
description: CinLink media tools for agents: subtitles, translation, dubbing, video understanding, AI image/video generation, and hosted media workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Video, subtitles, dubbing, and AI media
interface.longDescription: Use CinLink from agents through focused skills and a hosted-first CLI. Configure a CinLink API key, transcribe and translate media, burn styled subtitles locally, create dubbing and voice translation, summarize and shorten videos, generate AI images and videos, and run hosted multi-step media workflows.
defaultPrompt: Transcribe this video and create subtitles
Summarize this long video and make a highlight plan
